page_metadata.biotools__summary: FOG can help mapping important genomic features to the latest version of the human genome and also to annotate new features. such as miRNAs, microarray primers or probes, Chip-on-Chip data, CpG islands and SNPs to name a few.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FOG can help mapping important genomic features to the latest version of the human genome and also to annotate new features. such as miRNAs, microarray primers or probes, Chip-on-Chip data, CpG islands and SNPs to name a few.
